question: Cho ba bảng: - Người dùng: User (user_id, user_name, dept_id, role_id, status) - Phòng ban Department (dept_id, dept_name, status) - Vai trò: Role (role_id, role_name, status). B: SELECT u.user id, u.user_name, d.dept_name , r.role_name FROM User u LEFT JOIN Department d ON u.dept_id=d.dept_id LEFT JOIN Role r ON u.role_id=r.role_id
